archetype: Terminal Luxury (Hybrid Archetype 4 & 5) - Code-respecting, Sharp, Confident

typography.rules: Strictly NO Inter or Space Grotesk. Use IBM Plex Mono for all headings, numbers, and technical data to establish the 'Terminal/Developer' vibe. Use IBM Plex Sans for long-form body text. Headings must use tracking-tight. Overlines/labels must be uppercase with tracking-[0.2em].

colors.rules: Stick strictly to the AUREM palette. Do not introduce generic SaaS blues or purples. Use the accent_gold sparingly for primary actions.

surfaces.glass_pattern: background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(212,175,55,0.05) 0%, rgba(10,10,18,0.7) 100%); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.2);
surfaces.border_radius: rounded-sm or rounded-none (Sharp edges preferred to maintain terminal aesthetic).

motion.hover_state: Slight lift (translate-y-[-2px]), border color shifts to rgba(212,175,55,0.5), subtle shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.15)]. Transition duration: 300ms ease-out.
motion.page_enter: Staggered fade-up and slide-in from bottom (translateY 10px to 0, opacity 0 to 1). 400ms duration.

layout_spacing.scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for internal card padding to prevent collision. Use 'Control Room Grid' (gap-4 or gap-6) for dashboards.

components_map.Card: Use shadcn/ui Card but strip default backgrounds. Apply 'glass_pattern' for prominent feature cards (e.g., Pricing, Auth) and 'flat_panel' for dense dashboard metric cards.
components_map.Button: Primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A0A12] hover:opacity-90. Secondary/Ghost: border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10. Always sharp (rounded-sm).
components_map.Input: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-[#F0EADC] focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-sm.
components_map.Badge: border border-[#D4AF37]/30 bg-[#D4AF37]/10 text-[#D4AF37] rounded-sm font-mono text-xs tracking-wider.

pages.layout: Asymmetrical Grid / Full viewport height hero

sections.name: Hero
sections.content: Exact Copy H1: 'Build with an autonomous CTO.' (IBM Plex Mono, text-5xl md:text-6xl). P: '1000 tokens free.' Single email input field and submit button ABOVE the fold.

sections.name: Full Form
sections.content: Below the fold: comprehensive form including name, company, intent.

sections.name: Multi-step Flow
sections.content: OTP verification -> GitHub username -> 'What will you build' -> Referral code.

sections.name: Integrations
sections.content: Cards for: GitHub OAuth, MongoDB string input, VS Code extension install, BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) inputs for Anthropic/DeepSeek/Gemini.

sections.name: Top Metrics
sections.content: Token counter (Large Mono font, always visible), Active project status, Rate-limit indicator.

sections.name: Activity Feed
sections.content: Terminal-like scrolling list of recent ORA activity.

sections.name: Metrics & Charts
sections.content: Pixel analytics: Weekly visitors, Top pages (Table), Lead scores, Token usage graph (use Recharts).

sections.name: Tiers
sections.content: GLASS pattern cards: Starter $9 / Builder $39 / Pro $99 per month. Prominent Stripe checkout links.

sections.name: Plain English Terms
sections.content: Readable typography. Covers: As-is delivery, BYOK responsibility, abuse = instant suspension, PIPEDA deletion rights.

sections.name: Preferences
sections.content: BYOK key rotation inputs, Account deletion (30-day wipe) danger zone, Consent toggle (20% discount highlight), Active sessions list.

sections.name: Project List
sections.content: 5 specific example projects. Each shows Description, Tech Stack Tags, Estimated Tokens, and a 'Build this' CTA that pre-fills ORA chat.

sections.name: Component Status
sections.content: Live indicator lights (Green/Yellow/Red) mapped to components. Mono font last updated timestamp.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: 1. Build exclusively using React 18 (.js/.jsx) and Tailwind CSS. 2. Implement all 10 pages EXACTLY as mapped to the routes above using react-router-dom. 3. Include ALL specified data-testids as they are mandatory for the testing agent to pass 401 and functional tests. 4. Heavily utilize the AUREM gold palette and 'glass_pattern' (linear gradient + backdrop blur + gold border) for interactive/hero elements to ensure consistency with existing portal components like DeveloperPortalPulseTile. 5. Guarantee the exact hero copy on /developers: 'Build with an autonomous CTO. 1000 tokens free.' above a single email field. 6. Do NOT invent new pages or additional dashboard tiles outside this scope.
